code:
SELECT c.country_id, c.country_name
FROM countries c
JOIN car_makers cm ON c.country_id = cm.country
LEFT JOIN model_list ml ON cm.id = ml.maker
LEFT JOIN car_names cn ON ml.model = cn.model
WHERE cn.make = 'fiat' OR c.country_id IN (
    SELECT country
    FROM car_makers
    GROUP BY country
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
)
GROUP BY c.country_id, c.country_name;

ORDER BY r.ranking_date DESC
LIMIT 1;

code:
WITH MaxPercentage AS (
    SELECT 
        countrycode, 
        MAX(percentage) AS max_percentage
    FROM 
        countrylanguage
    GROUP BY 
        countrycode
)
SELECT 
    c.name AS country_name, 
    cl.language, 
    cl.percentage
FROM 
    country c
JOIN 
    countrylanguage cl ON c.code = cl.countrycode
JOIN 
    MaxPercentage mp ON cl.countrycode = mp.countrycode AND cl.percentage = mp.max_percentage
ORDER BY 
    c.name;

    ORDER BY count ASC

WHERE d.breed_code = (SELECT breed_code FROM breed_counts);
